title: croton gracilipes
intro: Croton gracilipes, a species of flowering plant in the spurge family, is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Croton gracilipes include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
